migrations.sql:
CREATE TABLE `appointment` (
  `title` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `description` TEXT,
  `type` VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'other',
  `starts_at` DATETIME,
  `ends_at` DATETIME,
  `location` VARCHAR(255),
  `estate_id` VARCHAR(36),
  `created_by_user_id` VARCHAR(36),
  `id` VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `created_at` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

CREATE TABLE `appointment_contact` (
  `appointment_id` VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `contact_id` VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `id` VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `created_at` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

CREATE TABLE `appointment_user` (
  `appointment_id` VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `user_id` VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `role` VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'attendee',
  `id` VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `created_at` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

CREATE TABLE `audit_log` (
  `user_id` VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `action` VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `entity_type` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `entity_id` VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `field_name` VARCHAR(255),
  `old_value` TEXT,
  `new_value` TEXT,
  `ip_address` VARCHAR(45),
  `changes` JSON NOT NULL,
  `id` VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `created_at` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

CREATE TABLE `contact` (
  `type` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'misc',
  `entity_type` VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'person',
  `company_name` VARCHAR(255),
  `salutation` VARCHAR(255),
  `first_name` VARCHAR(255),
  `last_name` VARCHAR(255),
  `email` VARCHAR(255),
  `phone` VARCHAR(255),
  `mobile` VARCHAR(255),
  `street` VARCHAR(255),
  `zip` VARCHAR(255),
  `city` VARCHAR(255),
  `country` VARCHAR(255),
  `stage` VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'cold',
  `assigned_user_id` VARCHAR(36),
  `office_id` VARCHAR(36),
  `custom_fields` JSON NOT NULL,
  `search_profiles` JSON NOT NULL,
  `gdpr_consent` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `gdpr_consent_date` DATETIME,
  `gdpr_deletion_requested` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `gdpr_deletion_requested_at` DATETIME,
  `notes` TEXT,
  `id` VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `created_at` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

CREATE TABLE `contact_relationship` (
  `contact_id` VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `related_contact_id` VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `type` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `notes` TEXT,
  `id` VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `created_at` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

CREATE TABLE `document` (
  `file_path` VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `file_name` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `mime_type` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `file_size` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `category` VARCHAR(30),
  `estate_id` VARCHAR(36),
  `contact_id` VARCHAR(36),
  `appointment_id` VARCHAR(36),
  `email_id` VARCHAR(36),
  `uploaded_by_user_id` VARCHAR(36),
  `id` VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `created_at` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

CREATE TABLE `email` (
  `email_account_id` VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `direction` VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'incoming',
  `status` VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'received',
  `message_id` VARCHAR(500),
  `in_reply_to` VARCHAR(500),
  `from_address` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `to_addresses` TEXT NOT NULL,
  `cc_addresses` TEXT,
  `bcc_addresses` TEXT,
  `subject` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `body_html` MEDIUMTEXT,
  `body_text` MEDIUMTEXT,
  `sent_at` DATETIME,
  `received_at` DATETIME,
  `contact_id` VARCHAR(36),
  `estate_id` VARCHAR(36),
  `email_template_id` VARCHAR(36),
  `id` VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `created_at` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

CREATE TABLE `email_account` (
  `user_id` VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `name` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `email_address` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `imap_host` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',

  `imap_encryption` VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ssl',
  `smtp_host` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `smtp_port` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 465,
  `smtp_encryption` VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ssl',
  `username` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `password_encrypted` TEXT,
  `active` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `last_sync_at` DATETIME,
  `last_error` TEXT,
  `id` VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `created_at` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

CREATE TABLE `email_template` (

) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

CREATE TABLE `jobs` (
    `id` VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
    `queue` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'default',
    `payload` TEXT NOT NULL,
    `status` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
    `attempts` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    `error` TEXT,
    `run_at` DATETIME NOT NULL,
    `started_at` DATETIME,
    `completed_at` DATETIME,
    `failed_at` DATETIME,
    `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Create essential indexes for queue performance
CREATE INDEX jobs_queue_status_run_at_index ON jobs (queue, status, run_at);
CREATE INDEX jobs_status_run_at_index ON jobs (status, run_at);
CREATE INDEX jobs_status_index ON jobs (status);
migrations.description: Create jobs table and indexes for queue system
